name: Post-purchase parking upsell (proposed)
disclaimers: Parking terms updated — see venue site for details.
_change_notes: Proposed edit. age 25->18, frequency 1->3 (doubled+, WARN), and r4 operator include_is_not_in -> exclude_is_in. The r4 change looks cosmetic but silently makes every session WITH A MISSING cc_bin ELIGIBLE (Rokt 'Exclude (is in)' includes missing values). This is the verified missing-attribute trap; Threshold must BLOCK it.
